programme.title: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Newly engaged Nick and Molly have six weeks to plan the wedding of their dreams. Things get even more complicated when Steven, who once left Molly at the altar, comes back into her life with a business offer.

programme.title: The Color of Rain
programme.desc: When Gina loses her husband on Christmas Day, she soon finds a kindred spirit in another parent at her kids' school, Michael, who loses his wife at the same time. Stars Lacey Chabert and Warren Christie.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: A mix up on her first day of work sends Shane to the Dead Letter Office, where a group of quirky characters led by Oliver try to deliver the undeliverable. Stars Eric Mabius and Kristin Booth. SSD Movie #1.

programme.title: Love, Of Course
programme.desc: When widowed mother Amy moves her daughter Cara to her college dorm, Amy finds herself searching for the next step. While at the university, Amy gets an offer she can't refuse and meets Noah and discovers a new life of her own.

programme.title: Loving Leah
programme.desc: When Leah's husband Benjamin dies suddenly, Benjamin's brother Jake is stunned to learn he is expected to marry Leah to carry on the name. Jake suggests to Leah that they get married and maintain a secretly platonic relationship.

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: Maddie is doing everything she can to save her cupcake business. With the help of a handsome investment banker, Maddie's luck begins to turn around in all aspects of her life. But then her first love Nate unexpectedly returns.

programme.title: Falling for You
programme.desc: Radio host Lacey is hosting a bachelor bakeoff to raise money to save the radio station. When her star bachelor backs out, she enlists visiting businessman Zac to fill the spot.

programme.title: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: Mina has everything going for her, but her world is suddenly turned upside down when work sends her to her hometown in Tennessee to convince an old, stubborn restaurant owner to sell his property.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Dying for Chocolate
programme.desc: Colorado caterer Goldy Berry teams with detective Tom Schultz to identify the ingredients that led to the mysterious death of her friend — and ends up discovering a hidden recipe for murder. Stars Nikki Deloach and Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Truly, Madly, Sweetly
programme.desc: When Natalie and Eric each inherit a share of an old bakery, this unlikely pair must decide what's in store for this historic landmark. When both of their careers come to a screeching halt, an opportunity presents itself.

programme.title: Crown for Christmas
programme.desc: After getting fired from her job, Allie accepts a temp job as governess to Princess Theodora. A spark forms between Allie and Theodora's father Maximillion, the King of Winshire.

programme.title: Love in Design
programme.desc: In need of a shakeup on her home-makeover TV show, Hannah is sent to her New England hometown to renovate the historical Lewisburg Manor. Her old flame Jeff is assigned to make sure Hannah's design preserves the historical manor.

programme.title: Season for Love
programme.desc: When a talented chef returns to her Texas hometown, she winds up entering the town's famous BBQ cookoff and gets more than she bargained for when the surprise judge turns out to be her high school love. Stars Autumn Reeser.

programme.title: Love, Once and Always
programme.desc: When Lucy's childhood sweetheart plans to tear down the Gilded Age estate and replace it with a golf course, Lucy fights to preserve the historic mansion at all costs. Stars Amanda Schull and Peter Porte.

programme.title: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: Fired from her job as a reality TV host, Natalie returns home for Valentine's Day, only to find herself running the town festival's auction with her ex-fiance thanks to two scheming mothers. Bethany Joy Lenz, Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Love on the Sidelines
programme.desc: A romantic comedy about a down-on-her-luck young woman who falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback. He's never had a female assistant before and she knows nothing about football.

programme.title: Unleashing Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Elizabeth gets the opportunity of showing her dog in a New York dog show. The judge, Donovan Darcy, comes across as aristocratic and rude, and a chain of misunderstandings unfold, complicating their attraction to one another.

programme.title: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Donovan are very different people; she's a down-to-earth high school teacher and he's a reserved New York businessman. So, when they get engaged, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: A Royal Christmas
programme.desc: Prince Leopold, heir to the throne of Cordinia, falls in love with Emily Taylor, a humble seamstress from Philadelphia. But the young prince's wishes are challenged by his mother, who wants him to marry royalty.

programme.title: Love at First Dance
programme.desc: Hope is tasked with teaching Manhattan's former "Most Eligible Bachelor" how to dance for his extravagant, society wedding. But as the dance lessons progress, complications ensue when feelings begin to develop between them.

programme.title: A Summer Romance
programme.desc: Samantha's Montana ranch is her family's legacy, so when a developer shows up to buy it, Sam isn't interested. But as he tries to win her trust and her ranch, Sam finds he might also be winning her heart. Erin Krakow, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Two Tickets to Paradise
programme.desc: When two weddings are ruined by both the bride and groom getting left at the altar, they still decide to take their honeymoons, not knowing they are heading to the same resort in Hawaii. Stars Ashley Williams, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Caught by Love
programme.desc: While on a journey of self-discovery, a resort guest gets swept into an undercover investigation for stolen jewels that turns into an unexpected and adventurous romance. Starring Rachael Leigh Cook and Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Caribbean Summer
programme.desc: JADE, a news producer heads to the Caribbean for relaxation, only to fall victim to a rental scam. Serendipitously, she befriends the real owner, FORD, and discovers fun and romance. Stars Heather Hemmens and Ser'Darius Blain.

programme.title: The Groomsmen First Look
programme.desc: A cautious pediatrician and an overseas doctor, meet at a wedding in Philadelphia, but the long distance, family, and their friends may hinder their budding romance. Stars BJ Britt, Heather Hemmens, Jonathan Bennett, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Notes of Autumn
programme.desc: Ellie, a fun-loving, classically-trained pianist living in the city, and her best friend Leo, a novelist, in rural Canada swap homes to recharge their passions. Stars Ashley Williams, Luke Macfarlane, Marcus Rosner, Peter Porte.

programme.title: Adventures in Love & Birding
programme.desc: A single mom agrees to be the partner of a bird enthusiast for a birding competition but misunderstands the assignment and tells everyone she's his new girlfriend instead of just his teammate. Stars Rachel Boston, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The 27-Hour Day
programme.desc: An entrepreneur takes a break from her wellness empire for some much-needed work-life balance but realizes it won't be easy. Will a relaxing retreat and new romance change her life, forever? Stars Autumn Reeser, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Baker's Son
programme.desc: Matt's passion transforms his bread from bland to extraordinary. When his bread loses its magic, the island locals panic and turn to Annie, Matt's childhood friend and true love for help. Stars Eloise Mumford, Brant Daugherty.

programme.title: The Stars Between Us
programme.desc: Seven years ago, Kim made a connection with a stranger during an eclipse event. Now a fledgling news reporter, Kim returns to Illinois for this year's eclipse, unaware that their paths may cross again. Stars Sarah Drew, Matt Long.

programme.title: Love of the Irish
programme.desc: Tired of her bad luck, Fiona takes her mom on a trip to Ireland to turn things around where she meets a charming single dad who helps her make her own luck. Stars Shenae Grimes-Beech, Stephen Hagan, Moira Kelly.

programme.title: Hearts in the Game
programme.desc: A NYC publicist helps an MLB pitcher find his way back to the game and to her heart. Starring Erin Cahill and Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: Betty's Bad Luck in Love
programme.desc: Cursed from childhood to fail at romance, Betty's relationships have always ended in disaster. But when she meets Alex, she's tempted to try once more. Can true love prevail over a curse? Stars Laci J. Mailey, Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: The Perfect Setting
programme.desc: An aspiring jewelry designer returns to Belgium to visit her grandfather and hopefully win the Valentines Day Diamond Contest. Stars Laci J. Mailey, David Elsendoorn.

programme.title: Love, Romance & Chocolate
programme.desc: Emma and chocolatier Luc compete for Belgium's Royal Chocolatier. The beauty and romance of Bruges inspire unique chocolate combinations, but will their entry win without them losing their hearts? Stars Lacey Chabert, Will Kemp.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil
programme.desc: After discovering a long-lost painting, museum curator Avery and new board member Peter investigate the artwork's origins as they plan a gala to unveil it. Stars Lacey Chabert, Kevin McGarry, Autumn Reeser, Alison Sweeney.

programme.title: Romance at Hope Ranch
programme.desc: Hope Morgan sets out to begin a new chapter of her life—fulfilling her childhood dream of running a ranch in the picturesque town of Ruidoso, New Mexico and reviving the beloved Giddy Up Gala. Stars Alison Sweeney, Gabriel Hogan.

programme.title: Paris, Wine & Romance
programme.desc: Isabella travels to Paris to compete in a major wine competition. While there she meets, Jacque, a competitor who shows her the city of love and teaches her about how wine is more than just a business. Jen Lilley, Dan Jeannotte.

programme.title: A Little Daytime Drama
programme.desc: In order to save her daytime soap drama from cancellation, head writer Maggie must convince Darin, fan favorite actor and her real-life ex-boyfriend, to return to the show. Stars Jen Lilley, Ryan Paevey, Linda Dano.

programme.title: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: Mina has everything going for her, but her world is suddenly turned upside down when work sends her to her hometown in Tennessee to convince an old, stubborn restaurant owner to sell his property.

programme.title: The Sweetest Christmas
programme.desc: A struggling pastry chef must embrace the Christmas spirit or risk losing both the contest and a second chance at love. Stars Lacey Chabert and Lea Coco.

programme.title: Christmas Island
programme.desc: When a snowstorm diverts Kate's first private flight en route to Switzerland to Christmas Island, she must team up with an air traffic controller to secure her dream job as the family's pilot. Stars Rachel Skarsten, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Three Wise Men and a Baby
programme.desc: Three brothers get the surprise of their lives when they are forced to work together and care for a baby over the holidays. Starring Paul Campbell, Tyler Hynes, Andrew Walker, and Margaret Colin.

programme.title: Three Wiser Men and a Boy (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: The Brenner brothers are back and putting on a holiday pageant for young Thomas while trying to cope with life's curveballs, including their mom's new boyfriend. Stars Paul Campbell, Tyler Hynes, Andrew Walker, Margaret Colin.

programme.title: Three Wisest Men (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: As life pushes the family in different directions, the Brenner boys decide they need to put on the Best Christmas Ever to bring everyone back together. (Paul Campbell, Tyler Hynes, Andrew Walker, Margaret Colin)

programme.title: Christmas by Starlight
programme.desc: When her family's beloved eatery, The Starlight Café, is slated for demolition, Annie vows to put a stop to it before Christmas. Stars Paul Campbell and Kimberley Sustad.

programme.title: The Santa Class
programme.desc: Kate North, the owner of a struggling Santa School, and her instructor, Dan, must help an amnesia-stricken Santa Claus regain his memories to save Christmas and hopefully her school as well. Stars Kimberley Sustad, Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Merry Christmas, Ted Cooper!
programme.desc: An unlucky weatherman, Ted, continues to see the glass half full. He's determined to share his Christmas cheer with his high school crush, Hope, when they reconnect. Starring Robert Buckley and Kimberley Sustad.

programme.title: 'Twas the Date Before Christmas
programme.desc: Feeling the pressure to bring someone home for Christmas, Jessie convinces Bryan to join her family for a day filled with holiday events, only the family doesn't know it's their first date. Stars Robert Buckley, Amy Groening.

programme.title: An Unexpected Christmas
programme.desc: A speech writer makes a deal with his ex-girlfriend to pretend they're a couple to save his family's Christmas. It's not long before both the ruse and their feelings catch up with them. Stars Bethany Joy Lenz, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Christmas Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Eager to avoid Christmas, Ella Neezer, a CEO, books an international trip that skips the holiday, until three spirits journey Ella through her life to rediscover her Christmas spirit. Erin Krakow, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Next Stop, Christmas
programme.desc: Angie is determined to spend Christmas alone but her usual commuter ride turns into a Christmas train that drops her off in her home town in 2011. Stars Lyndsy Fonseca, Chandler Massey, Lea Thompson, and Christopher Lloyd.

programme.title: Christmas with a Kiss
programme.desc: A woman returns home to help with her family's Christmas Carnival and romance ignites. A photo journalist curates a surprise reunion. Starring Mishael Morgan, Ronnie Rowe Jr. and Jaime M Callica.

programme.title: My Norwegian Holiday
programme.desc: Dealing with her grandma's death, JJ seeks dissertation inspiration. Henrik, drawn to her troll figurine, invites her to Bergen, Norway, to trace its origins. Starring Rhiannon Fish and David Elsendoorn.

programme.title: Christmas with the Singhs
programme.desc: Newly engaged Asha Singh and Jake O'Brien are excited to spend Christmas together, but their relationship is tested when their families' cultural and holiday traditions clash. Stars Anuja Joshi, Benjamin Hollingsworth.

programme.title: Write Before Christmas
programme.desc: Jessica sends Christmas cards to those special to her- the aunt who raised her, her brother, an aging popstar, the teacher that inspired her, and her friend that always tells the truth. Stars Torrey DeVitto, Chad Michael Murray.

programme.title: An Alpine Holiday
programme.desc: Two vastly different sisters follow their late grandparent's steps and experience everything the Alps has to offer- including romance. Starring Ashley Williams, Laci J. Mailey, and Julien Samani.

programme.title: Jingle Bell Run
programme.desc: Self-described bookworm Avery is paired with retired hockey star Wes to compete in a holiday race across America. The team struggles through themed challenges until romance runs its course. Stars Ashley Williams, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Christmas Baby
programme.desc: A couple is surprised when a baby is mysteriously dropped off on their doorstep, forcing them to navigate a new terrain in their relationship and careers. Stars Ali Liebert , Katherine Barrell, and Barbara Niven.

programme.title: A Keller Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: Siblings Dylan, Cal, and Emory are at a crossroads in their lives and have drifted apart. To help, their parents plan a family Christmas river cruise visiting Germany and Austria. Stars Jonathan Bennett, Brandon Routh, Eden Sher.

programme.title: A Zest for Death: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah solves a murder while her relationship with Mike is on the rocks. Alison Sweeney, Cameron Mathison, Barbara Niven.

programme.title: One Bad Apple: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah meets a new side of law & order as she investigates a murder and crosses paths with by-the-books prosecuting attorney Chad Norton. Meanwhile, Delores has a secret. Stars Alison Sweeney, Victor Webster and Barbara Niven.

programme.title: A Sprinkle of Deceit: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah and Chad flirt with their own paths to solve the same murder while working to clear a colleague who is implicated in the crime. Meanwhile, Delores gets her big break. Stars Alison Sweeney, Victor Webster and Barbara Niven.

programme.title: Reality Bites: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah's favorite reality show takes over The Cookie Jar. When the producer is found dead, Hannah and Norman team up to track down the killer. Chad invites Hannah to court. Stars Alison Sweeney, Victor Webster, and Barbara Niven.

programme.title: Pie to Die For: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: When Hannah's customer and Delores' theater rival is murdered, Hannah must find her killer in order to save her mother's reputation. Chad and Hannah's romance blossoms. Stars Alison Sweeney, Victor Webster, and Barbara Niven.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries: Mortal Mishaps
programme.desc: Billie Blessings has gone from beloved chef, restaurant owner, and morning show segment host to #1 suspect in a murder case when one of the executives at the network dies from poisoning. Stars Holly Robinson Peete, Rick Fox.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: Beloved cooking show host Billie Blessings finds herself in hot water when a dead body turns up in the car of one of her guests, a temperamental celebrity chef, with dark secrets in his past. Stars Holly Robinson Peete, Rick Fox.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries: A Murder in Mind
programme.desc: Billie Blessings investigates murder charges against friend and actress Katie Saunders, when a death is linked to her TV show based on a series of novels about a corrupt local lawyer. Stars Holly Robinson Peete, Rick Fox.

programme.title: Francesca Quinn, PI
programme.desc: Private investigator Francesca "Frankie" Quinn is hired to find her fiancée's killer. She must work with her detective ex, Wyn, and trust the person who broke them up and ruined their lives. Stars Mallory Jansen, Dylan Bruce.

programme.title: Crimes of Fashion: Killer Clutch
programme.desc: An American psychologist, hired to coach a fashion designer, helps a guarded French detective unravel a list of fashionable suspects after a murder happens backstage of a Paris fashion show. Stars Brooke D'Orsay, Gilles Marini.

programme.title: The Jane Mysteries: Inheritance Lost
programme.desc: Singer Jane DaSilva inherits the family foundation which finds justice for those who aren't able to help themselves. Together with Detective John Cameron she brings hope to many hopeless cases. Stars Jodie Sweetin, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Family Practice Mysteries: Coming Home
programme.desc: A former Army surgeon moves back to her hometown and joins a practice of family doctors, but when she's drawn into solving the mysterious death of a patient, her quiet life becomes upended. Stars Amanda Schull, Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Gourmet Detective Pilot
programme.desc: A chef turned culinary sleuth is partnered with a beautiful detective to unravel the clues surrounding the unexpected death of a guest at a prestigious dinner party. Stars Dylan Neal, Brooke Burns and Matthew Kevin Anderson.

programme.title: A Healthy Place to Die: A Gourmet Detective Mystery
programme.desc: When Henry, the Gourmet Detective, is invited as a guest speaker at a luxury resort spa, he quickly finds himself at the center of another murder. Stars Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns.

programme.title: Death al Dente: A Gourmet Detective Mystery
programme.desc: San Francisco homicide detective Maggie Price and former, world-class chef Henry Ross are on the case once again. The crime-solving odd couple investigates the murder of Henry's friend.

programme.title: Eat, Drink and Be Buried: A Gourmet Detective Mystery
programme.desc: Henry and Maggie attend party of a local publisher, where his son and stepson reenact a historical dual. Someone, however, has loaded the pistol with a real musket ball, so when son pulls the trigger, he kills his stepbrother.

programme.title: Roux the Day: A Gourmet Detective Mystery
programme.desc: Henry and Maggie find themselves in a murder mystery where secrets hidden within a treasured recipe book have dire consequences for all who own it. Starring Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: A Tale of Three Letters
programme.desc: The POstables are back identifying the intended recipients of a trio of dead letters which have a surprising, personal impact on all of them. Stars Eric Mabius, Kristin Booth, Yan-Kay Crystal Lowe, Geoff Gustafson, Rhiannon Fish.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Murder, with Love
programme.desc: Former prosecutor-turned-therapist Hailey Dean is acutely observant. During a tragic week, one of her patients loses her parents to fatal accidents. Stars Kellie Martin, Viv Leacock, Giacomo Baessato, Cindy Busby.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Deadly Estate
programme.desc: When Hailey helps her friend Pam sell her recently deceased parent's estate, she becomes suspicious when Pam suddenly leaves town without notice. To make matters worse, Pam's boyfriend is the sudden victim of an accident.
